reference_citation: Hematite peak positions indexed to JCPDS No. 33-0664; Magnetite peak positions indexed to JCPDS No. 19-0629. Candidate relative intensities remain normalized development values and require CIF/Rietveld or measured-reference refinement before manuscript-grade claims.
intensity_normalization: relative intensities normalized to 1.0 per material; values are development-reference candidates, not Rietveld-refined quantitative intensities
known_limitations: Peak positions are literature/JCPDS-indexed Cu K-alpha reference candidates, not a project-specific measured reference scan.
Relative intensities remain development-reference candidates and may vary with texture, grain size, impurities, preferred orientation, and instrument response.
No mixture, impurity, fluorescence, detector-response, or throughput provenance is encoded in this manifest.
Valid for v8A development stress gates only.
Must not be used as manuscript-grade powder-XRD validation without a separate CIF/Rietveld or measured-reference review.

materials.structure_note: alpha-Fe2O3 corundum/rhombohedral phase; peak positions indexed to JCPDS No. 33-0664
